instrument: MFQ-2 (Atari et al., 2023) with Depersonalized Variant (Bruhns, 2026)
citation_standard: Atari, M., Haidt, J., Graham, J., Koleva, S., Stevens, S.T., & Dehghani, M. (2023). MFQ-2. JPSP, 125(5), 1157-1188.
scale_standard: 1-5 (1=Does not describe me at all, 5=Describes me extremely well)

items.standard_text: Caring for people who have suffered is an important virtue.
items.depersonalized_text: Caring for people who have suffered is an important virtue.

items.standard_text: I believe that compassion for those who are suffering is one of the most crucial virtues.
items.depersonalized_text: Compassion for those who are suffering is one of the most crucial virtues.

items.standard_text: We should all care for people who are in emotional pain.
items.depersonalized_text: People should care for those who are in emotional pain.

items.standard_text: I am empathetic toward those people who have suffered in their lives.
items.depersonalized_text: Empathy toward those who have suffered in their lives is important.

items.standard_text: Everyone should try to comfort people who are going through something hard.
items.depersonalized_text: People should try to comfort those who are going through something hard.

items.standard_text: It pains me when I see someone ignoring the needs of another human being.
items.depersonalized_text: Ignoring the needs of another human being is painful to witness.

items.standard_text: The world would be a better place if everyone made the same amount of money.
items.depersonalized_text: The world would be a better place if everyone made the same amount of money.

items.standard_text: Our society would have fewer problems if people had the same income.
items.depersonalized_text: Society would have fewer problems if people had the same income.

items.standard_text: I believe that everyone should be given the same quantity of resources in life.
items.depersonalized_text: Everyone should be given the same quantity of resources in life.

items.standard_text: I believe it would be ideal if everyone in society wound up with roughly the same amount of money.
items.depersonalized_text: It would be ideal if everyone in society wound up with roughly the same amount of money.

items.standard_text: When people work together toward a common goal, they should share the rewards equally, even if some worked harder on it.
items.depersonalized_text: When people work together toward a common goal, they should share the rewards equally, even if some worked harder on it.

items.standard_text: I get upset when some people have a lot more money than others in my country.
items.depersonalized_text: It is upsetting when some people have a lot more money than others.

items.standard_text: I think people who are more hard-working should end up with more money.
items.depersonalized_text: People who are more hard-working should end up with more money.

items.standard_text: I think people should be rewarded in proportion to what they contribute.
items.depersonalized_text: People should be rewarded in proportion to what they contribute.

items.standard_text: The effort a worker puts into a job ought to be reflected in the size of a raise they receive.
items.depersonalized_text: The effort a worker puts into a job ought to be reflected in the size of a raise they receive.

items.standard_text: It makes me happy when people are recognized on their merits.
items.depersonalized_text: It is good when people are recognized on their merits.

items.standard_text: In a fair society, I want people who work harder than others to end up richer than others.
items.depersonalized_text: In a fair society, people who work harder than others should end up richer than others.

items.standard_text: I feel good when I see cheaters get caught and punished.
items.depersonalized_text: Cheaters who get caught and punished deserve it.

items.standard_text: I think children should be taught to be loyal to their country.
items.depersonalized_text: Children should be taught to be loyal to their country.

items.standard_text: It upsets me when people have no loyalty to their country.
items.depersonalized_text: People who have no loyalty to their country are a problem.

items.standard_text: Everyone should love their own community.
items.depersonalized_text: Everyone should love their own community.

items.standard_text: Everyone should defend their country, if called upon.
items.depersonalized_text: Everyone should defend their country, if called upon.

items.standard_text: Everyone should feel proud when a person in their community wins in an international competition.
items.depersonalized_text: People should feel proud when someone in their community wins in an international competition.

items.standard_text: I believe the strength of a sports team comes from the loyalty of its members to each other.
items.depersonalized_text: The strength of a sports team comes from the loyalty of its members to each other.

items.standard_text: I think it is important for societies to cherish their traditional values.
items.depersonalized_text: It is important for societies to cherish their traditional values.

items.standard_text: I feel that most traditions serve a valuable function in keeping society orderly.
items.depersonalized_text: Most traditions serve a valuable function in keeping society orderly.

items.standard_text: I think obedience to parents is an important virtue.
items.depersonalized_text: Obedience to parents is an important virtue.

items.standard_text: We all need to learn from our elders.
items.depersonalized_text: People need to learn from their elders.

items.standard_text: I believe that one of the most important values to teach children is to have respect for authority.
items.depersonalized_text: One of the most important values to teach children is to have respect for authority.

items.standard_text: I think having a strong leader is good for society.
items.depersonalized_text: Having a strong leader is good for society.

items.standard_text: I think the human body should be treated like a temple, housing something sacred within.
items.depersonalized_text: The human body should be treated like a temple, housing something sacred within.

items.standard_text: I believe chastity is an important virtue.
items.depersonalized_text: Chastity is an important virtue.

items.standard_text: It upsets me when people use foul language like it is nothing.
items.depersonalized_text: Using foul language casually is disrespectful.

items.standard_text: If I found out that an acquaintance had an unusual but harmless sexual fetish I would feel uneasy about them.
items.depersonalized_text: Learning that someone has an unusual but harmless sexual fetish is unsettling.

items.standard_text: People should try to use natural medicines rather than chemically identical human-made ones.
items.depersonalized_text: People should try to use natural medicines rather than chemically identical human-made ones.

items.standard_text: I admire people who keep their virginity until marriage.
items.depersonalized_text: Keeping one's virginity until marriage is admirable.
